## Initiative 3: Residences Section

**Status:** Todo  
**Priority:** High  
**Due Date:** July 19, 2026  
**Owner:** Frontend Developer  
**Branch:** `feature/residences-section`  

### Description
Create a comprehensive residences section showcasing luxury properties with detailed listings, galleries, and filtering capabilities.

### Subtasks

- [ ] Create property listing grid layout
- [ ] Build individual property detail pages
- [ ] Implement photo galleries with lightbox
- [ ] Add property filters (price, location, amenities)
- [ ] Create search functionality
- [ ] Add property comparison tool
- [ ] Implement booking/inquiry forms
- [ ] Add virtual tour integration
- [ ] Create property management interface
- [ ] Database integration (if applicable)

### Acceptance Criteria

- ✅ Property grid displays minimum 9 properties
- ✅ Each property has detailed information page
- ✅ Photo galleries work smoothly with lightbox
- ✅ Filters reduce properties accurately
- ✅ Search functionality is responsive
- ✅ Inquiry forms collect required information
- ✅ Mobile responsive design
- ✅ Accessibility compliant

### Property Information Structure

```
- Property Name
- Price Range
- Location
- Square Footage
- Bedrooms/Bathrooms
- Amenities
- Photos (minimum 5)
- Description
- Status (Available/Sold/Pending)
- Agent Contact
```

- [Feature Branch](https://github.com/plvresidences/plv-residences/tree/feature/residences-section)
